svg.title: Pennifold character lockups v1
svg.desc: Vector badge portraits of Fitzroy Shillings Pennifold, an elderly Barbadian man in a cream guayabera and trilby, and Stackwell Stacks Pennifold, a young Barbadian man in a black tee with gold trident chain, each with a name plate.

text.style: font-family: var(--font-sans); font-weight: 500; font-size: 18px; letter-spacing: 2px;;fill:rgb(255, 255, 255);stroke:none;color:rgb(11, 11, 11);stroke-width:1px;stroke-linecap:butt;stroke-linejoin:miter;opacity:1;font-family:"Anthropic Sans", sans-serif;font-size:18px;font-weight:500;text-anchor:middle;dominant-baseline:auto

font-family: Georgia, serif; font-style: italic; font-size: 14px;;fill:rgb(232, 184, 75);stroke:none;color:rgb(11, 11, 11);stroke-width:1px;stroke-linecap:butt;stroke-linejoin:miter;opacity:1;font-family:Georgia, serif;font-size:14px;font-weight:400;font-style:italic;text-anchor:middle;dominant-baseline:auto
